items.label: Spark Focus
items.promptAdd: tiny alien machine creature (20cm tall, six-limbed, ceramic-metal shell, geometric engravings, bioluminescent panels, unique personality), NOT a literal spark/flame/light, ancient Progenitor artifact, curious posture, personality visible in body language
items.negativeAdd: fire, flame, electricity, sparkle, literal spark, bonfire

items.label: Progenitor Ruins
items.promptAdd: ancient alien ruins, geometric relief patterns, cathedral-scale Progenitor architecture, copper-colored alien stonework, forty-thousand-year-old structures, sealed chambers, archaeological excavation, alien geometric script

items.negativeAdd: swimsuit, revealing, fashion model, clean pristine

items.label: Crucible Arena
